contact.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about our consultation services
contact.faq1Title: Is the initial consultation really free?
contact.faq1Answer: Yes, we provide a free 30-minute initial consultation to evaluate your case and provide preliminary advice.
contact.faq2Title: What is the response time for consultations?
contact.faq2Answer: We are committed to responding within 24 hours for normal cases, and within 2 hours for urgent cases.
contact.faq3Title: Will my information be kept confidential?
contact.faq3Answer: Of course. We are bound by professional ethics and guarantee the confidentiality of all client information in accordance with applicable law.
contact.faq4Answer: Yes, we provide online consultation services via video call, phone, or chat for client convenience.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A trusted law firm in Bali that has served clients for over 15 years with a commitment to providing the best and most professional legal solutions.
about.ourJourneyP1: DrHukum was founded in 2009 with a vision to become the leading law firm in Bali providing high-quality legal services. Starting from a small office with 3 lawyers, we have now grown into a trusted law firm with an experienced professional team.
about.ourJourneyP2: During our journey, we have handled more than 500 cases with a 95% success rate. Client trust is our greatest asset, and we continue to be committed to providing the best service.
about.ourJourneyP3: We are proud to be a legal partner for individuals, multinational companies, SMEs, and various organizations in Bali and throughout Indonesia.
about.missionText: To provide high-quality legal services accessible to all, prioritizing integrity, professionalism, and client satisfaction. We are committed to being a trusted partner in resolving various legal issues with effective and efficient solutions.
about.visionText: To become a leading law firm in Indonesia known for excellence in providing innovative legal solutions, building long-term trust with clients, and contributing positively to the development of the legal system in Indonesia.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Important information regarding the terms of service, privacy policy, and disclaimer to protect the rights and interests of all parties.

1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.text: By using DrHukum's services, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our services.

2.title: 2. Legal Services
2.text: DrHukum provides legal consultation, legal representation, and other related services. All services are provided in accordance with applicable laws in Indonesia and the professional code of ethics for advocates.

3.title: 3. Attorney-Client Relationship
3.text: An attorney-client relationship is formed upon the signing of a legal service agreement. Prior to that, any communication is general consultation and does not create a binding legal relationship.

4.title: 4. Confidentiality
4.text: We are committed to maintaining the confidentiality of all information provided by clients in accordance with attorney-client privilege and applicable laws and regulations.

5.title: 5. Payment and Fees
5.text: The fee structure will be explained transparently before services begin. Payment is made according to the agreement in the legal service agreement.

6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
6.text: DrHukum is not responsible for losses arising from delays or failures in providing services caused by force majeure or factors beyond our control.

7.title: 7. Changes to Terms
7.text: We reserve the right to change these terms and conditions at any time. Changes will be notified through the website or direct communication with clients.

1.title: 1. Information Collection
1.text: We collect information that you provide directly, such as name, email address, phone number, and legal case details to provide optimal services.

2.title: 2. Use of Information
2.text: The information collected is used to: provide legal services, communicate with clients, process payments, and improve service quality.

3.title: 3. Data Protection
3.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.

4.title: 4. Information Sharing
4.text: We will not share your personal information with third parties without your consent, except as required by law or for law enforcement purposes.

5.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
5.text: Our website uses cookies to enhance user experience. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.

6.title: 6. Your Rights
6.text: You have the right to access, update, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

7.title: 7. Data Retention
7.text: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide services and comply with legal obligations, typically for 7 years after the end of the attorney-client relationship.

1.title: 1. Nature of Information
1.text: The information provided on this website is general in nature and is not intended as specific legal advice. Every legal situation is unique and requires individual analysis.

2.title: 2. No Guarantee of Results
2.text: We cannot guarantee a specific outcome in a legal case. The result depends on various factors including the facts of the case, applicable law, and court decisions.

3.title: 3. Website Information
3.text: Although we strive to maintain the accuracy of the information on the website, we are not responsible for any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies that may occur.

4.title: 4. External Links
4.text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those websites.

5.title: 5. Jurisdiction
5.text: These terms and conditions are governed by Indonesian law. Any disputes will be resolved through the competent courts in Indonesia.

6.title: 6. Professional Consultation
6.text: Always consult your specific legal issue with a qualified advocate. Do not rely on general information to make important legal decisions.

noticeContent.effectiveDate: Effective Date: These terms and conditions are effective as of January 1, 2024, and may be updated at any time.
noticeContent.contact: Contact for Questions: If you have questions about these terms and conditions, please contact us at info@drhukum.com or +62 81 25 25 25 966.
noticeContent.language: Language: In the event of any discrepancy in interpretation between the Indonesian version and other language versions, the Indonesian version shall prevail.

terms.standardsSubtitle: Our commitment to the highest ethical and professional standards

standards.ethicsDesc: We adhere to the Indonesian advocate's code of ethics and international standards in providing legal services.
standards.clientInterestDesc: The client's interest is our top priority in every representation and legal service provided.
standards.transparencyDesc: We are committed to being transparent in communication, fees, and legal processes with all clients.

terms.ctaSubtitle: If you have questions about these terms and conditions or require legal consultation, do not hesitate to contact our team.
